description:
🕒 09:30–12:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-hannouv-onedaymarch/

We'll guide you through a roughly 10 km course based on last year's "Hanno New Green Two-Day March," while teaching you about Hanno's rich natural attractions. During the pleasant new green season, you'll visit Hanno River (飯能河原), Tenranzan, Azumakyō, Asahi Mountain, and more.

【Participation Fee】
Adults: ¥1,000
Students: ¥500

【Capacity】 50 people

【Guide】 Saitama Hanno University staff

【What to Bring】 Drinking water, and rain gear depending on the weather

【Notes】 For details, see Saitama Hanno University website: https://hanno-univ.net/
location: 集合 NPO法人埼玉ハンノウ大学事務局 （飯能市仲町6-1(旧飯能織物協同組合事務所棟) 西武池袋線飯能駅下車徒歩7分
summary: Easy New Green One-Day March – Enjoy Hanno, a Forest Culture City
